title: Natural gas and coal extend gains amid supply shortages
section_path: Natural gas and coal extend gains amid supply shortages
section_path_text: Natural gas and coal extend gains amid supply shortages
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Rising geopolitical risks saw a risk-off tone across markets. This weighed on commodity markets, which struggled to hold gains achieved earlier this week. Crude oil ended higher in a choppy session as traders counted down to an OPEC meeting on supply.
